name: MacFlex
description: Whether you're planetside or in vacuum, RSI's MacFlex industrial armor set has your back. Reinforced plating keeps you safe from environmental hazards while the array of pouches keep your tools accessible. == Armor components == == Editions == === Rust Society Edition === The Rust Society Edition celebrates blue-collar workers with an exclusive red and tan coloration that hides dirt and wear and tear well. It was given out in individual parts (i.e. Arms, Legs, Torso, Helmet, undersuit), one per month, as Subscriber Flair to Imperator-Level backers. Current subscribers can retro-actively purchase the flair in the store. == Gallery ==

name: ADP
description: == Product description == "Revolutionary when first released, the ADP heavy armor system was heralded as the pinnacle of personal protection. Clark Defense Systems' maximalist design provides plenty of attachment points and excellent protection against the elements and enemy fire. CDS refined and reshaped the ADP line over the years, but many still consider the original ADP to be the touchstone of military-grade heavy armor." == Armor components == == Model == === Variations === (All are available in-game only) == Gallery == == References ==

name: ADP-mk4
description: The ADP-mk4 is a heavy armor developed by Clark Defense Systems for the UEE Marine Corps. Its maximalist design provides plenty of attachment points and excellent protection against the elements and enemy fire. CDS refined and reshaped the ADP line over the years, but many still consider the original ADP to be the touchstone of military-grade heavy armor. == Armor components == == Model == === Variations === (All are available in-game only) === Special editions === == Gallery == == References ==

name: ORC-mkV
description: Clark Defense Systems' ORC-mkV armor has been a trusted and enduring choice on the battlefield for centuries. This medium armor is highly regarded for its dependable and durable construction, which combines composite plating with a special fiber reinforced polymer. The result is a solid level of protection that allows for a wide range of movement. The ORC-mkV is a prime example of how dependable and durable armor never goes out of style, and continues to be a staple for those who require reliable protection in high-risk situations. == Armor components == === Variations ===

name: ORC-mkX
description: The mark X is the latest in CDS' award-winning Omni-Role Combat armor series. This EVA-rated suit features new EdgeCore composite weave technology, maximizing protection against projectiles, explosives and the elements while minimizing operator agility. == Armor components == == Armor variants ==

name: PAB-1
description: Clark Defense Systems built the PAB-1 light but strong enough to stay in a fight. The first CDS suit to utilize their proprietary nano-weave, this light armor became a favorite of those who needed a little extra protection while remaining agile. == Armor components ==

name: FBL-8a
description: The FBL-8a set is an armor set manufactured by Clark Defense Systems. There are currently three color variants available. No helmet belongs to the armor set as of the current LIVE build, but the Mandible Helmet is believed to be the one. == In-game description == CDS's quest to create the ideal light armor continues with the FBL-8a. This light armor will keep you fast on your feet with its strategic mix of protective plating and reinforced nano-weave fabrics. While the armor works with any undersuit, it was specifically designed to match the FBL-8u undersuit with special attention given to how the two fit together to make the set as streamlined and responsive as possible. == Model == === Variations === (All are available in-game only) == Armor components == == Development == The FBL-8a set was introduced in Alpha 3.11.1 in the Intergalactic Aerospace Expo 2950 event. == References ==

name: Field Recon Suit
description: CDS' Field Recon Suit is the perfect solution for the combat operator who wants a little extra protection without compromising any of their situational agility. EdgeCore composite plating is strategically sewn into the nano-weave suit to cover vital organs while keeping the suit flexible. == Armor components ==
